reviews.comment:
La empleada más o menos como predisposición. Poca opción de comida. El perro atigrado un divino. Todo limpio (baños) .

(Translated by Google)
The employee was more or less helpful. Limited food options. The brindle dog was adorable. Everything was clean (bathrooms).

Great service! Clean bathroom. The staff was very attentive.

Excellent service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VKM2F5b0MwMlpxeDJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar espectacular buen combustible muy buena atención los empleados una maravilla acampe tres días en el lugar habilitado con asadores mesas, los baños muy limpios, se puede quedar con toda seguridad

(Translated by Google)
A spectacular place, good fuel, very good service, the staff were wonderful. I camped for three days in the designated area with grills and tables; the bathrooms were very clean. You can stay there with complete confidence.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJUDF3OEhtM0pPcUxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Partiendo de que del trato que es de lo último la poca amabilidad, no hay variedad para desayunar es solo café, no cobran con la app no te suman los puntos. De todas las ACA sin dudas la peor de todas. Próximamente evitarla siempre que pueda un desastre!!!

(Translated by Google)
Starting with the terrible service and lack of friendliness, the breakfast menu is limited to coffee, and they don't accept payments through the app, so you don't earn points. Of all the ACA locations, this is undoubtedly the worst. I'll be avoiding it whenever possible—it's a disaster!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VLeUM3bzJDaU12UDRRRRAB
